rules.name: Data Processing Consent
rules.description: Data processing agreements must require explicit consent for sub-processor engagement

rules.name: Data Transfer Restrictions
rules.description: International data transfers must comply with adequacy requirements or have appropriate safeguards

rules.name: Data Retention Limits
rules.description: Contracts must specify clear data retention periods with justification

rules.name: Privacy Notice
rules.description: Customer data usage must be clearly disclosed and limited to stated purposes

rules.name: Unilateral Price Changes
rules.description: Contracts should not allow unilateral price changes without notice period

rules.name: One-sided Indemnification
rules.description: Indemnification clauses should not cover the indemnified party's own negligence

rules.name: Unlimited Liability Waiver
rules.description: Complete liability waivers may be unenforceable and should have reasonable limits

rules.name: Assignment Without Consent
rules.description: Contracts should require consent for assignment to protect party interests

rules.name: At-Will Termination Notice
rules.description: Employment contracts should provide reasonable notice periods for termination

rules.name: Excessive Non-Compete
rules.description: Non-compete clauses must be reasonable in duration and geographic scope

rules.name: Mandatory Arbitration
rules.description: Mandatory arbitration clauses may limit employee rights and should be disclosed

rules.name: Uptime Guarantees
rules.description: SaaS agreements should include binding uptime commitments with remedies

rules.name: Data Location Disclosure
rules.description: Cloud services must disclose specific data storage locations for compliance

rules.name: Refund Policy
rules.description: Prepaid services should have fair cancellation and refund policies

rules.name: Expense Documentation
rules.description: Expense reimbursement should require reasonable documentation
